tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb

recommended.song_name: Wake Me Up When September Ends
Good Riddance Time Of Your Life

content:
I'm not an expert on Green Day but I would think it more likely that this is played half a step down than
with a capo. Lots of versions of this posted, most with bits missing or incorrect, so I thought I'd try 
and do a more complete and accurate version.
Lots of this is played in power chords but  I didn't feel the need to put 5s everywhere, if you are playing
power chords simply ignore the m's on the F#m's.
Comments and corrections welcome

INTRO: [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] x6 

VERSE 1:
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
Hear the sound of the falling rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]C#[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]C#[/ch]
Coming down like an armageddon flame, the shame, the ones who died without a name [/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
Hear the dog's howling out of key[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]C#[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]C#[/ch]
To a hymn called faith and misery,and plead, the company lost the war today  [/tab]
